description_long: This is a robust, cubic storage box constructed from horizontal wooden planks framed by thick, dark metal bands at the edges and corners. The wood is textured with visible grain patterns and is marked with irregular red paint splatters and streaks, giving it a rugged, possibly industrial or urban appearance. The top of the box is closed with the same wooden planks, flush with the frame, and there are no visible hinges, handles, or openings. The box appears solid and heavy, suitable for storing or transporting goods in urban environments such as warehouses, alleys, or garages. The metal frame adds structural integrity and protection to the wooden panels, suggesting durability and resistance to rough handling. The absence of any visible locking or labeling features implies it is a generic, multi-purpose storage container.
description: A sturdy, cubic wooden storage box reinforced with dark metal bands and marked with red paint splatters. The box is fully enclosed and has a rugged, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: The front view shows the wooden planks with subtle grain and a few faint red marks, framed by thick metal edges.
description_view_1: This side features a prominent red paint streak across the wooden planks, making it more visually distinct than the other views.
description_view_2: This view displays the most red paint splatters, with several streaks and spots scattered across the wood surface.
description_view_3: Similar to view 2, this side has multiple red paint splatters, but the pattern is slightly less dense and more spread out.
